news.title: US stocks resume upward climb as dollar advances again after Fed outlook
news.summary: Wall Street stocks bounced Thursday, pivoting back to buying mode after the pullback in the prior session prompted by a Federal Reserve policy outlook that signaled possible rate hikes ahead.Major US indices had fallen about one percent or more on Wednesday after newly installed Fed Chair Kevin Warsh highlighted the central bank's commitment to price stability as the Fed released an updated outlook that raised the inflation forecast and projected a rate hike in 2026.

news.title: The VIX Isn’t Broken, It’s Just Being Outplayed
news.summary: Whether it's macro complexity, divergent market performance, or investor uncertainty, any way you slice it, the recipe for volatility is baked in. So why isn’t the VIX reflecting that? “Vixologist” Jim Carroll reveals the truth behind why markets feel much more volatile than the measurements.
